customers_say: Customers find this smart lock to be the best in class, with professional installation and reliable performance. They appreciate its sleek appearance, with one customer noting it adds a modern touch to the door. The lock offers excellent security with triple deadlocks and multiple authentication methods, while the app interface is easy to use. They like its feature-rich design, including multiple unlocking options and customizable access permissions.

reviews.author: Sasha
reviews.title: Very good buy -- value for money and user friendly
reviews.body: Excellent product with good customer support. The technician did the installation neatly and cleaned up the place afterward. He explained the product and it's features clearly. It saves a lot of hassle of searching for keys and is also extremely good from a safety point of view. One suggestion would be to add face recognition as a feature.

reviews.author: Nikhil Bhagat
reviews.title: Smooth installation, works perfectly.
reviews.body: Smooth installation, working perfectly just like advertised. Aruj ji was very helpful during the entire process.

reviews.title: Review
reviews.body: Awesome product. Works really well and exceed expectation

reviews.title: Nice lock and feature rich
reviews.body: Good smark lock, working fine as expected on day 1 installation done.

reviews.title: Awesome Product!
reviews.body: This is an awesome product and thoroughly enjoying the features.
